# Data Model Checklist: Compute Proximity to Amenities for Baseline Desirability

**Purpose**: Validate data model requirements completeness and alignment with the feature spec.
**Created**: 2026-03-10
**Feature**: `/home/ayra/ECE_493/Capstone-Test-Repo/specs/007-amenity-proximity/spec.md`

**Note**: This checklist is generated by the `/speckit.checklist` command based on feature context and requirements.

## Requirement Completeness

- [x] CHK001 Are all data items listed in the spec explicitly defined with fields and types? [Completeness, Spec §Data Involved]
- [x] CHK002 Are fields defined for amenity categories, shared search radius, and amenity query results? [Completeness, Spec §Functional Requirements]
- [x] CHK003 Are fields defined for fallback values when no amenities are found? [Completeness, Spec §Alternate Flows]
- [x] CHK004 Are fields defined for distance method selection and fallback logging? [Completeness, Spec §Alternate Flows]
- [x] CHK005 Are fields defined for weighting rules, defaults, and desirability score? [Completeness, Spec §Functional Requirements]

## Requirement Clarity

- [x] CHK006 Are constraints for distance/count metrics (non-negative, consistent units) represented? [Clarity, Spec §Functional Requirements]
- [x] CHK007 Is determinism across repeated runs represented in the model or metadata? [Clarity, Spec §Functional Requirements] Note: Necessary; /prompts:speckit.plan rerun.

## Requirement Consistency

- [x] CHK008 Do acceptance scenarios and functional requirements agree on omitted features when coordinates are unresolved? [Consistency, Spec §Acceptance Scenarios, Spec §Functional Requirements]

## Scenario Coverage

- [x] CHK009 Are data representations defined for coordinate-resolution failure outcomes? [Coverage, Spec §Exception / Error Flows]
